title: mentha × brassaiana
intro: Mentha × brassaiana, also known as East Indian mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is native to the Indian subcontinent. It possesses medicinal properties due to its rich composition of compounds like rosmarinic acid, which has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of East Indian mint include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. East Indian mint can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
